name: Inside The WarDome
description:
The inside of the stadium offers a dramatic contrast.  Like the exterior,
the stands offer the most luxurious accommodations for the spectators.  The
field however, is a battleground composed of mud, turf and rock surrounded by
an 8-foot high stone wall.  There are two entrances to the playing field--as
audience participation is welcomed, though not strongly recommended.  To the
east are the Blue Seats, to the north are the West Stands.  Going west, you
exit the stadium.
